title: universal-spawn Figma platform extension
description: Strict JSON Schema for the `platforms.figma` object.

manifest_file.description: Relative path to the Figma plugin manifest.json.

allowed_hosts.description: Hostnames the plugin is allowed to reach. Required when network_access is 'allowed-hosts'.

widget.description: True if this creation is a Figma Widget (not a Plugin).

menu_file.description: Relative path to a JSON file describing the plugin menu.
